method: RCSB REST API PDB verification + raw paper reading per file (DOI matching, resolution cross-check, construct/expression/detergent/buffer/crystallization verification)

files.verdict: PASS — promote to agent
files.notes: All claims verified. Resolution 3.0Å matches paper and RCSB. Expression (native T. tepidum), detergents (LDAO, DPC), buffer (Tris pH 7.5), crystallization (sitting-drop vapor diffusion with PEG3000/CaCl2/glycerol) all confirmed from paper Methods section.

files.verdict: PASS — promote to agent
files.notes: All claims verified. Resolution 2.9Å matches. Expression (L. lactis NZ9000, nisin-inducible), DDM detergent, HEPES buffer pH 7, Ni-NTA affinity, SEC confirmed from paper Methods. Embedded lipid (PG/POPG) in binding cavity confirmed.

issues: 6VS2, 6VS0, 6VS1 in structures[] but not in pdb_dois — these are additional PDBs from the same paper, DOI verified by RCSB for each
files.verdict: PASS — promote to agent
files.notes: All four PDBs (6VRZ 2.0Å, 6VS2 3.0Å, 6VS0 2.1Å, 6VS1 3.0Å) verified by RCSB and DOI match. pdb_dois only lists 6VRZ but structures[] correctly includes all four. Expression (E. coli), DDM/NG/LDAO detergents, Tris/HEPES buffers confirmed.

issues: resolution and space_group are empty strings in structures[]
files.verdict: PASS — fix empty resolution, promote to agent
files.notes: 6IIA verified as MexB+LMNG complex at 2.91Å via RCSB. Empty resolution/space_group in YAML need filling. LMNG as inhibitor in distal binding pocket confirmed.

issues: 2JLN appears twice in structures[] for different conformations — same PDB, different states (outward-open at 2.85Å and occluded at 4.0Å)
files.verdict: PASS — promote to agent
files.notes: Both papers verified. 2JLN (outward-open 2.85Å) and 2X79 (inward-facing 3.8Å) confirmed by RCSB. The duplicate 2JLN entry reflects different refinement states from same PDB deposition.

files.verdict: PASS — promote to agent
files.notes: 2XQ2 (2.7Å) and 3DH4 (2.7Å) both verified. 3DH4 DOI matches science.1160406 which is correct. Sodium-galactose symport mechanism confirmed.

issues: 6Q3A (3.1Å, also from same paper) in structures[] but not in pdb_dois

files.notes: 6NWR (3.5Å, thioester intermediate) and 6Q3A (3.1Å, apo form) both verified. Fix resolution for 6Q3A. Add 8AQ2 (2.6Å, P. aeruginosa Lnt) to structure.

files.notes: All 6 PDBs verified by RCSB as Mep2 structures from same paper. pdb_dois should include 5AF1, 5AID, 5AH3, 5FUF. Resolution values need quoting fixes.

issues: 3DHW in pdb_dois but NOT in structures[] — structures array is empty
files.verdict: PASS — add 3DHW (3.7Å) to structures[]
files.notes: PDB 3DHW verified by RCSB as MetNI methionine importer. Enrich: add structure entry with resolution 3.7Å.

issues: DOI 10.1038##NSMB.2721 has uppercase NSMB — paper file found as 10.1038##nsmb.2721.md, needs lowercase fix
3B9B in structures[] is SERCA Ca2+-ATPase (doi 10.1038/nature06418) — WRONG, not LpCopA
3RFU appears TWICE in structures[] (first at 3.2Å E2.Pi, second at 2.0Å E2.Pi — wrong resolution)
4BBJ (2.75Å, E2P state from nsmb.2721 paper) missing from structures[]

files.verdict: FAIL — source DOI case issue, wrong PDB (3B9B=SERCA), wrong uniprot/organism
files.notes: Needs major repair: remove 3B9B, add 4BBJ, fix second 3RFU entry, fix uniprot to Q8RNP6 and organism to Legionella pneumophila, fix NSMB to nsmb in sources.

issues: RA120 vs ra120 case issue: paper file is 10.1074##jbc.ra120.014118.md (lowercase)
6X13 is GltPh glutamate transporter (doi 10.7554/eLife.58417) — WRONG, should be 6XL3
6XL3 (correct PDB for MastR wild-type) in pdb_dois but NOT in structures[]
6WP8 (MastR-T74D mutant) verified correctly at 2.5Å
files.verdict: FAIL — source DOI case issue, 6X13 is wrong protein (GltPh), should be 6XL3
files.notes: Fix source DOI to lowercase: jbc.ra120.014118. Replace 6X13 with 6XL3. 6WP8 (T74D mutant at 2.5Å) is correct. Paper Methods confirm DDM/OG detergents, MES pH 6.5 buffer, bicelle crystallization with PEG2000/citrate/ammonium sulfate.

files.notes: 6C5W (FgMCU X-ray structure at 3.4Å from paper) should replace all three wrong PDBs. The paper also has MaMCU structure entries. Complete structures[] rebuild needed.

issues: Placeholder PDB: 'not in raw text' — needs replacement with 4EV6

files.verdict: FAIL — placeholder PDB ID 'not in raw text'
files.notes: Fix: replace 'not in raw text' with 4EV6 (3.2Å, MjCorA from PNAS paper). Detergent: dodecyl-maltoside. Buffer: HEPES-NaOH with MgCl2. Crystallization: vapor diffusion, 30% PEG8000.

files.notes: Fix ELIFE to elife in sources. Add 4CZ9 (3.5Å, pH4) and 4CZA (3.2Å, Tl-bound) to pdb_dois. All three PDBs verified by RCSB. Paper details confirmed: expression (E. coli C41), Cymal-5 detergent, Tris buffer, PEG crystallization.

files.notes: 2R9R actually belongs to nature06265 (Science 2008, Long et al.), not cell.2005.12.035. Fix: update sources to include nature06265. Fix resolution quoting to '2.8'. Channel-insertion paddle-chimera mechanism confirmed.

The wrong PDBs (4LDE, 4LDF, and non-standard codes) are likely from sidebar corruption or cross-contamination with other GPCR YAMLs. Fix NATURE09746 case in sources.
